zh.lifeSummary: 當William Adams於大約1531年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆時，他的父親Thomas Adams23歲，母親Ellen Burslem23歲。他於大約1567年與Margery Danyell在英國斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1574年在他的家鄉享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Adams于大约1531年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆时，他的父亲Thomas Adams23岁，母亲Ellen Burslem23岁。他于大约1567年与Margery Danyell在英国斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1574年在他的家乡享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Pasquale, Adriano, Aldo, Amadeo, Amedeo, Antonio, Armando, Cristiano, Donato, Emilio, Erasmo, Eugenio, Gerado, Marco, Salvatore, Saverio.
Italian: patronymic from the personal name Adamo, an equivalent of Adam .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Adams was born about 1531, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Adams, was 23 and his mother, Ellen Burslem, was 23. He married Margery Danyell about 1567, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1574, in his hometown, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Adams est né environ 1531, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Adams, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Ellen Burslem, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margery Danyell environ 1567, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1574, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Adams um 1531 in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Adams 23 und seine Mutter Ellen Burslem 23. Er hat um 1567 in Burslem, Staffordshire, England Margery Danyell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1574 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Adams è nato il circa 1531 nel Burslem, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Adams, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Burslem, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margery Danyell circa 1567, nel Burslem, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1574, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Adamsが約1531年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムで生まれた時，父Thomas Adamsは23歳，母Ellen Burslemは23歳であった。約1567年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムでMargery Danyellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1574年に故郷で45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Adams(이)가 대략 1531년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Adams(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Burslem(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1567년 영국 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 Margery Danyell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1574년 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Adams nasceu aproximadamente 1531, em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Adams, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Burslem, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Danyell aproximadamente 1567, em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Adams родился около 1531 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Adams было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen Burslem, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Danyell около 1567 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1574 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет.
